Video.summary: Carl Reiner and Melba Moore guest star on this episode.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Carl Reiner, Melba Moore

Video.summary: Carol struggles with "Easy Open" packaging, Harvey & Tim spoof Jacques Cousteau, and Carol & Vicki are torn.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Guests John Davidson and Ross Martin appear in "The Helen Feibelbaum Story", a spoof of celebrity biopics.
Video.title: Ross Martin, John Davidson

Video.summary: Dick Martin is the town gigolo on "As The Stomach Turns." Also: a spoof of "Sunset Boulevard."
Video.title: Steve Lawrence, Dick Martin

Video.summary: The season-ending "Family Show" features the best variety show ensemble on television.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Paul Sand plays a shy man trying to gain confidence by listening to a self-help record.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Steve Lawrence, Paul Sand

Video.summary: Paul Sand and Eydie Gorme guest star in a salute to movie series such as "Dr. Kildaire".
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Eydie Gorme, Paul Sand

Video.summary: Guest Jack Weston matches with Carol on a computer date, Carol sings, and Harvey plays Dr. Jekyll.
Video.title: Jack Weston

Video.summary: Carol's series premiere guest is Jim Nabors. Plus "V.I.P." interview with Shirley Dimple.
Video.title: Jim Nabors

Video.summary: Guests Rich Little & Eydie Gorme join in a tribute to Alfred Hitchcock! Also: Carol and Harvey play a couple.
Video.title: Rich Little, Eydie Gorme

Video.summary: The cast of "The Carol Burnett Show" revisits some of their favorite moments from the show.
Video.title: The Carol Burnett Show: Show Stoppers

Image.alt: The Carol Burnett Show: Show Stoppers
The Carol Burnett Show: Show Stoppers

Video.summary: The Pointer Sisters are tonight's musical guests!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Pointer Sisters

Video.summary: Martha Raye and Betty Grable guest in the soap opera spoof "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Martha Raye, Betty Grable

Video.summary: Ken Berry stars with Carol as unsuccessful Western movie stars in "The Saga Of Lily And Billy."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Dionne Warwick, Ken Berry

Video.summary: Guest Ken Berry performs "Mack The Knife", then joins Carol, Harvey, and Trini Lopez in a musical melodrama.
Video.title: Ken Berry, Trini Lopez

Video.summary: Clowning legend Emmett Kelly, a musical performance from The Jackson 5, and Carol in "A Swiped Life."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Emmett Kelly, Jackson Five

Video.summary: Nanette Fabray and Michele Lee guest star, featuring a commercial take-off and "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.title: Nanette Fabray, Michele Lee

Video.summary: Tim Conway guests for a sketch where a betrothed couple elect to paint their future home-with messy results.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Tim Conway

Video.summary: Maggie Smith stars as Tim's girlfriend in a sketch where he is honored with a ship. And, a spoof of "Jaws."
Video.title: Maggie Smith

Video.summary: In this episode, Carol contends with a peeping tom. Later, Carol, Dick, Vicki, and Tim offer up a concert.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: The Rat Pack meets The Burnett Bunch when Peter Lawford guests!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Peter Lawford, Minnie Pearl

Video.summary: Guest Lucille Ball joins Carol for "The Rock Sisters!" George Carlin is on hand with words that you CAN say.
Video.title: Lucille Ball, George Carlin

Video.summary: Dyan Cannon & Paul Lynde star. Lynde plays an insurance salesman, and Cannon is on "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.title: Dyan Cannon, Paul Lynde

Video.summary: Mama, Eunice, and Ed return from an inspiring Sunday sermon. Also: Carol & Harvey share "Bedtime Honesty."
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Neil Sedaka joins in parodies, Harvey learns not to flirt at the I.R.S. office, & Carol gets guests to leave.
Video.title: Neil Sedaka

Video.summary: Guest Soupy Sales and Carol are shoppers. "The Old Folks" get a visit & Carol quits smoking in "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: Soupy Sales

Video.summary: Tim and Carol spar over a call, Tim tries to sell Vicki a vacuum, and the gang performs a musical recital.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Guest star Tim Conway steals the show as a bank robber, and as a conventioneer double booked in a hotel room.
Video.title: Tim Conway

Video.summary: Rock Hudson and Nancy Walker join for sketch set in the days of vaudeville, "When My Baby Laughs At Me."
Video.title: Rock Hudson, Nancy Walker

Video.summary: Jonathan Winters returns. Also, "Carol & Sis" plan a surprise party; and Carol is "Mrs. Invisible Man."
Video.title: Jonathan Winters

Video.summary: Rita Moreno guest stars, appearing in a sketch as a nurse. Also featured: Tim as a hapless officer.
Video.title: Rita Moreno

Video.summary: Lucille Ball and George Carlin guest! Lucy and Carol play flight attendants, and George serves up stand-up.
Video.title: Lucille Ball, George Carlin

Video.summary: Guests Ken Berry and Totie Fields drop by to take part in "Carol & Sis" and "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.title: Ken Berry, Totie Fields

Video.summary: Diahann Carroll and Tim Conway star. Features singles out on the town, and "Arrivaderci Summertime."
Video.title: Tim Conway, Diahann Carroll

Video.summary: Nancy Wilson and Nanette Fabray star in "As The Stomach Turns." On "Carol & Sis", siblings practice First Aid.
Video.title: Nancy Wilson, Nanette Fabray

Video.summary: The Family steps out as Mama, Eunice, and Ed go to a restaurant, and Tim's "Oldest Man" is a sheriff.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Joanne Woodward spends an evening with "The Family." Joanne plays a past schoolmate of Eunice's.
Video.title: Joanne Woodward
